# CompassPoint Advisory

> Strategic consulting for Australian SMEs and startups.

CompassPoint Advisory is a Melbourne-based strategic consulting firm purpose-built for Australian small and medium enterprises (SMEs) and startups. Founded by Amelia Ghofrany, a strategic business leader with 20+ years of senior experience at IBM, Fujitsu, DXC Technology, and Bupa.

## Services
- Business Strategy Consulting
- Operations and Process Optimisation
- Change Leadership and Culture Transformation
- AI and Digital Transformation Consulting
- Executive Coaching for Senior Leaders
- On-Demand Advisory
- Growth Accelerator Workshop

## Service detail pages (canonical URLs)
Each page includes the service summary, who it is for, what to expect, FAQs where relevant, and related services.
- [Business Strategy Consulting](https://www.compasspointadvisory.com.au/services/business-strategy-consulting)
- [Operations and Process Optimisation](https://www.compasspointadvisory.com.au/services/operations-process-optimisation)
- [Change Leadership and Culture Transformation](https://www.compasspointadvisory.com.au/services/change-leadership-culture-transformation)
- [AI and Digital Transformation Consulting](https://www.compasspointadvisory.com.au/services/ai-digital-transformation-consulting)
- [Executive Coaching for Senior Leaders](https://www.compasspointadvisory.com.au/services/executive-coaching)
- [On-Demand Advisory](https://www.compasspointadvisory.com.au/services/on-demand-advisory)
- [Growth Accelerator Workshop](https://www.compasspointadvisory.com.au/services/growth-accelerator-workshop)

## Key Facts
- Location: Melbourne, Victoria, Australia
- Serves businesses across Australia (Sydney, Brisbane, Perth, Hobart, Adelaide)
- Target clients: SMEs generating $5M–$20M annual revenue
- Offers free 30-minute discovery call (book at /book; Calendly embed)
- Website: https://www.compasspointadvisory.com.au
- Contact: amelia.ghofrany@gmail.com
